commands.purpose: Verify the exact set of typed bead_* MCP tool function names before writing any tool name into capabilities.yaml (anti-hallucination requirement).
commands.observed: 14 functions confirmed: bead_show, bead_ready, bead_list, bead_search, bead_create, bead_claim, bead_update, bead_update_notes, bead_review_write, bead_dep_add, bead_dep_remove, bead_close, bead_repos, bead_dolt_sync — matches the prompt's provided list exactly.

commands.purpose: Spot-check the design decision context: confirm review-agent/verification-agent do NOT declare manage_beads, and bead-orchestrator/quick-fix/session-close DO.
commands.observed: review-agent and verification-agent capabilities: [read_files, run_shell, inspect_git] only, no manage_beads. bead-orchestrator, quick-fix, session-close all declare manage_beads.

commands.purpose: RED gate for hermetic capabilities.yaml-level tests (no cognovis-core dependency).
commands.observed: 2 failed (test_manage_beads_capability_registry_has_explicit_typed_tools, test_build_agent_grants_manage_beads_typed_tools_end_to_end), both failing on 'manage_beads granted zero Claude tools (CL-j92j regression)' — the correct pre-fix reason. 1 passed (the negative regression fixture, which is expected to pass unconditionally since it tests the assertion helper itself).

commands.purpose: RED gate for fleet-level tests against the real cognovis-core sibling checkout. Required setting COGNOVIS_CORE explicitly because the default REPO_ROOT.parent resolution does not find the sibling repo when pytest runs from within a .claude/worktrees/<name>/ checkout.
commands.observed: 4 failed for the correct pre-fix reason (bead-orchestrator/quick-fix/session-close missing all 14 typed tools; the synthetic role-leakage fixture found zero leaked tools instead of the expected leak). 2 passed (review-agent/verification-agent already correctly have zero bead_* tools both before and after the fix — these assert the invariant that must hold in both states).

commands.command: git add tests/test_build_agent.py tests/test_cognovis_agent_fleet_capabilities.py && git commit -m "test(CL-j92j): red — ..."
commands.purpose: RED commit per mandatory TDD workflow.
commands.observed: Commit 1bd598b created. (A pre-commit hook printed a large unrelated JSON dump of bd issue data to stdout on this and subsequent commits — a pre-existing repo hook side effect unrelated to this bead; the commits themselves succeeded and git log/status confirmed a clean state afterward each time.)

commands.command: Edit capabilities.yaml: manage_beads.claude.tools: [] -> explicit 14-entry mcp__cognovis-tools__bead_* list
commands.observed: capabilities.yaml updated; tools list matches the verified bead_tools.py function names exactly, no additions or renames.

commands.purpose: GREEN gate for the new tests.
Full regression gate for touched files (whole test_build_agent.py + test_cognovis_agent_fleet_capabilities.py suite), per prompt Task step 6.
commands.observed: 45 passed (5.81s-6.04s across two runs, before and after the doc edits). No regressions in the wider agent fleet — every catalog agent still builds for both harnesses.

commands.command: git add capabilities.yaml && git commit -m "feat(CL-j92j): green — ..."

commands.observed: Both docs updated; ADR Status/Decision sections untouched, only a new Amendment subsection added before Cross-References.

commands.purpose: Re-confirm full regression gate after doc edits.

commands.purpose: Scope verification (AC3 review-tier MoC): confirm the full changeset is limited to the 5 named canonical files.
commands.observed: 5 files changed: capabilities.yaml, docs/adr/library-tool-surface-mcp.md, docs/mcp-migration-rollback.md, tests/test_build_agent.py, tests/test_cognovis_agent_fleet_capabilities.py. No cognovis-core/ files, no installed-artifact files, no unrelated capability edits.

commands.purpose: AC5 optional stronger-evidence live check: record a real progress note through the typed tool, per the bead's own MoC wording ('records a test note through the typed tool').
commands.observed: Envelope returned status ok, 'Notes appended to CL-j92j.' This call used tools already granted to this implementation session by its launching harness, not tools produced by this bead's fix — it demonstrates the typed surface works end-to-end but does not itself verify the capabilities.yaml fix (that is verified by the hermetic/fleet tests above).

commands.purpose: Validate the two required implementation artifacts against the deterministic contract before the final commit.
commands.observed: status: ok, 'implementation artifacts are valid' (after correcting an initial manifest.tests dict-vs-list shape mismatch).

The merge logic itself was verified correct and unchanged; AC4 is fully covered by pytest negative regression fixtures per the prompt's own preference ('prefer test-suite failures over adding new blocking runtime behavior').
